title: CEO & Founder (Super Admin)
bio:
Founder's Story

Joeziel Joey Vazquez-Davila is the CEO and founder of Credlocity, a reputable and ethical credit repair company that has been helping clients achieve financial and credit freedom since 2008.

Personal Journey

Joey's personal experience with credit bureaus and leading credit repair companies inspired him to establish Credlocity. In 2006, while applying to rent a home, he discovered fraud and unfair items on his credit report. He sought help from Lexington Law, a reputable credit repair company, but after paying over $100 monthly for a year with no results, he realized he had been scammed.

Determined to take control of his credit, Joey conducted extensive legal research and successfully disputed the fraudulent items on his own. His efforts resulted in impressive credit scores: 740 with TransUnion, 733 with Equifax, and 735 with Experian.

Building Credlocity

Word of Joey's success spread quickly among friends, family, and co-workers, who asked for his help with their credit issues. What started as helping others eventually evolved into a professional service, and Credlocity was born.

Ethical Credit Repair Mission

With a commitment to ethical and effective credit repair services, Credlocity helps people regain control of their credit and achieve financial freedom. Unlike companies that use generic dispute letters and charge upfront fees, Credlocity offers personalized service with a free trial period and a 180-day money-back guarantee.

Track Record of Success

Under Joey's leadership, Credlocity has revolutionized the credit repair industry by advocating for honesty and consumer-friendly practices. The company has successfully eliminated over 10,000 negative items from clients' credit reports between 2021 and 2023, maintaining an unparalleled track record with zero negative reviews.

A Personal Touch

As a family-owned and operated business, Credlocity prioritizes client privacy and provides a personalized approach to credit repair. Joey and his team handle all files and personal information in-house, creating custom dispute letters tailored to each client's specific circumstances.

"After my unsuccessful experience with Lexington Law, I knew there had to be a better way. I took matters into my own hands, learned the laws, and fixed my own credit. Now, I'm dedicated to helping others achieve the same financial freedom I found." - Joeziel Joey Vazquez-Davila
photo_alt: Joeziel Joey Vazquez-Davila, CEO & Founder of Credlocity
seo_meta_title: Joeziel Joey Vazquez-Davila - CEO & Founder | Credlocity
seo_meta_description: Meet Joeziel Joey Vazquez-Davila, founder of Credlocity. With 17 years of experience and board certifications in credit repair, Joey has helped thousands achieve financial freedom since 2008.

title: Chief Operating Officer (COO)
bio:
Sharmyn "Shar" Schaffeld serves as Chief Operating Officer of Credlocity Business Group, bringing 17 years of proven credit repair experience and a distinguished track record of helping thousands of clients achieve their financial dreams.

Professional Background

Shar founded CPR Credit Problem Repair in Boise, Idaho, building it into one of the most respected credit repair organizations in the Pacific Northwest. Her hands-on approach to client service and commitment to ethical practices earned CPR an outstanding reputation for transforming "credit in shambles" into homeownership opportunities.

Regulatory Credentials

Shar operates with full regulatory compliance and holds multiple professional licenses:

  • Idaho License #CCR-10773 MLS - Collection Agency/Credit Repair
  • Oregon License #DM-80114 MLS - Debt Management
  • NMLS #1672269 - Nationwide Mortgage Licensing System

These licenses demonstrate her commitment to operating within the strict regulatory framework required by Idaho's Collection Agency Act (Idaho Code §26-2221 et seq.) and Oregon's debt management statutes.

Expertise & Approach

Shar specializes in personalized credit repair strategies, focusing on:

  • One-on-one client consultations with clear communication
  • Comprehensive credit analysis and dispute strategies
  • Mortgage readiness preparation for homebuyers
  • Auto financing and credit score optimization
  • Regulatory compliance and consumer protection

Client Success

Throughout her career, Shar has helped hundreds of families achieve homeownership, secure auto financing, and qualify for refinancing. Her clients consistently praise her for raising credit scores dramatically—often to the 700+ range—and providing hope when other credit repair companies failed to deliver results.

Role at Credlocity

As COO, Shar oversees daily operations across both the Philadelphia headquarters and the Boise office. She leads the expanded team of 18 credit repair professionals, implements quality control processes, and ensures all client services meet the highest standards of excellence.
short_bio: Chief Operating Officer with 17 years of credit repair expertise. Licensed in Idaho and Oregon, Shar leads operations across Credlocity's bi-coastal offices.
photo_alt: Sharmyn Shar Schaffeld, Chief Operating Officer

seo_meta_description: Sharmyn Shar Schaffeld is the COO of Credlocity with 17 years of credit repair experience. Licensed in Idaho and Oregon. Expert in credit score optimization.

title: Mortgage Credit Specialist
bio:
Jennifer Thompson specializes in helping clients prepare their credit for mortgage applications. With 10 years of experience in both mortgage lending and credit consulting, she understands exactly what lenders look for and how to position clients for approval.

Mortgage Expertise

Jennifer has helped over 300 clients qualify for mortgages by strategically improving their credit profiles. She understands the nuances of credit scoring models used by mortgage lenders and knows how to optimize scores for home loan approval.

First-Time Homebuyer Focus

Jennifer is passionate about helping first-time homebuyers achieve their dream of homeownership. She provides comprehensive guidance on credit preparation, score improvement timelines, and what to expect during the mortgage approval process.

Previous Experience

Before joining Credlocity, Jennifer worked as a mortgage underwriter for 5 years, giving her insider knowledge of the lending process.

"Homeownership shouldn't be out of reach," Jennifer believes. "With the right credit preparation and guidance, many more people can qualify for mortgages than they realize."
short_bio: Mortgage Credit Specialist with 10 years experience. Helped 300+ clients qualify for mortgages through strategic credit optimization.
seo_meta_title: Jennifer Thompson - Mortgage Credit Specialist | Credlocity
seo_meta_description: Jennifer Thompson specializes in mortgage credit preparation at Credlocity. 10+ years experience helping first-time homebuyers qualify for mortgages.
seo_keywords: jennifer thompson, mortgage credit specialist, first-time homebuyer, mortgage preparation
